Fit-once scaffold for the season-blind daily target model (issue #16)

Source: R/mspaf_daily.R
dot-fit_daily_target.Rd

Calls fit_target_model() once, builds the static scaffolding needed for per-draw prediction, and precomputes the OU bridge Cholesky factors for every analyte over the full daily date grid. The result ("fitted daily model", fdm) is the input to .predict_daily_tox(); call .predict_daily_tox(fdm) once for point mode or N times (with a perturbed target model and OU-sampled eps_paths) for draw mode.

Usage

.fit_daily_target(
  site_rows,
  reference_model,
  imputation_model,
  conc_units,
  meta,
  tox_analytes,
  daily_long,
  ou_scale = 1,
  grab_cv = NULL,
  kappa = 0.5,
  method = "multi",
  guideline_dir = NULL,
  transform = "pseudo_log"
)

Arguments

site_rows

Grab chemistry for the site.

reference_model, imputation_model, conc_units, meta, tox_analytes

Forwarded to fit_target_model().

daily_long

Forward-filled daily chemistry for the site; supplies the date grid (qdates) and co-analyte values.

Value

A named list (fdm) or NULL on model failure.

On this page

Developed by Robin Shannon.
